description: Agent can read full database schema including all tables fields and relationships
netsuite_support: Partial — REST API exposes subset of fields per record type

description: Agent can create update delete records without vendor-imposed rate limits or field restrictions
netsuite_support: Limited — 10 concurrent API requests; some fields write-protected
odoo_support: Full — ORM + direct PostgreSQL write access

description: Consistent field names and record types across all modules and customizations
netsuite_support: No — SuiteScript/REST/CSV use different field names; SuiteApps add unprefixed custom fields
odoo_support: Yes — ORM enforces consistent naming; documented extension patterns
netsuite_workaround: Manual field mapping per agent per environment

description: Agent reacts to record changes as they happen without polling
netsuite_support: No native webhooks; SuiteFlow triggers limited to workflow events
odoo_support: Yes — PostgreSQL LISTEN/NOTIFY; native bus messaging

description: Agent can invoke or modify business logic without vendor approval or deployment constraints
netsuite_support: No — SuiteScript sandboxed; external agents cannot call SuiteScript directly
odoo_support: Yes — Python ORM; standard inheritance model; no deployment gating
